title: My ai trading bot
author: MobileZombie8236
selftext:
Hey Reddit! I'm Gopinath, and I've been messing around with this AI trading bot for about a month now. Started it just for my own trading, but it's been working pretty well so I thought other people might want to use it too.

Sorry if this post is a bit all over the place - I've been working on this thing nonstop and I'm pretty tired. But I wanted to share it.

Basically, I got sick of losing money on dumb trades and staying up watching charts all night. So I put together this bot that uses some machine learning stuff and OpenAI to watch the markets 24/7. It pulls live data from your connected Darwinex account, checks Reddit sentiment, and trades automatically through the Darwinex API. Best part? You don't need to keep your computer on or run any software - everything happens in the cloud while you sleep.

It's been trading my account for a while now and honestly does way better than I ever did manually. No more stupid emotional decisions, just lets the data do the work.

Problem is, running this in the cloud costs me around $150+ a month in server fees. I can't keep paying for this forever out of my own pocket, so I made a Kickstarter to try and raise $5K to cover the first year.

First 50 people who back it get 50% off any plan they choose forever - so the AI Enterprise plan would be $97.50/month instead of $197, or whatever plan you pick at half price. Once those 50 spots are gone, that's it.

The full website and AI trader will be available within the coming weeks. What you see in the video is just an alpha mock-up to show what we're building - the real platform will have all the features working with live trading.

Not trying to make millions here, just want to cover costs and help other people who are tired of losing money like I was. If you want to know how any of it works, just ask. I'll tell you straight up.

My Kickstarter is still being reviewed so I made a stripe link and it's on my profile if you want to support! Thanks!

Sorry for rambling - not much sleep lol.

  
ALSO I will make more videos as I continue making this and post some photos and videos demonstrating its trading!

comments.author: fiduciaryfalcon
comments.body: So tired of people calling anything algorithmic “AI.”

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body:
Well, it isn't only algorithmic, this trader isn't just a normal trading bot, it will be using gpt-4/claude sonnet 4 for a content reasoned analysis before each trade, using twitter and reddit sentiment and data from past trades and the machine learning models inside of the trading app. This software will have a brain and will be "AI" and also it will be using community training, so all the ai models used will be all simultaneously used by all the users on the site, the more users the more training the higher the accuracy for all traders using it!

Thank you for commenting!

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body:
Genuinely never heard of it, I wouldn't be surprised if someone is doing something similar, that's just business though, I have genuinely no understanding of my competition as all I have been doing day and night is creating this! I will promise to try my hardest to make it as original and worth while as I can!

I will look into the competition a bit so I can steer clear of any repetitive stuff in my product.

  
Feel free to ask any questions. Thanks!

replies.author: fiduciaryfalcon
replies.body: It’s literally your product, created 3 years ago, at a fraction of the cost.

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body: Well, I'd have to look into it, thanks for telling me!

comments.author: laiskas
comments.body: why not use gains from AI trader trades to cover cloud upkeep? or can't it even make 150 USD a month?

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body:
100 percent, although I don't have capital to use currently due to personal reasons and people in my life who have needed financial support recently. Also, all trades and proof of profitable trading, was all done on paper trading and demo trading with live data so I have made no income, I have certain personal reasons to make me start the Kickstarter. 

To be honest the raw cost of this ai to run would be anywhere between 50-100 dollars a month and currently its accuracy its 73 percent with minimal trading, I hope you stay to at least listen along to my progress!

thanks for your comment!

replies.author: ElongatedOnion
replies.body: You can trade it. This is a very long winded excuse.

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body: I am broke, no money=no trading but it doesn't mean I can't create something that will make me money when I have capital.

replies.author: ElongatedOnion
replies.body: Bullshit. You can buy a propfirm evaluation account with 50k leverage for less than $20, if you’re that broke go pick up some cans or something. The fact is you’re discrediting yourself with the excuses.

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body: bruh, I am sorry for upsetting you somehow, if you are so ignorant to others lives then possibly just don't donate and move along, it's not like I'm forcing you lmao

replies.author: GoGG999
replies.body:
>To be honest the raw cost of this ai to run would be anywhere between 50-100 dollars a month

Aaand.. that's why the IA bubble will burst in 1 or 2 years

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body: well the thing is in a year or less even AI will cost nothing to be able to do anything you want pretty much, because AI is going to revolutionize power efficiency, things that need a powerplant to run will eventually only need a few battery's or whatever it will be in the future, it's insane the little understanding of the things we create and use every day, and the fact that AI will be able to scale year's worth of research into just weeks is just fucking insane, I am scared for the future but excited to see either the evolution of humanity or the end.

comments.author: _leothesouthafrican_
comments.body: What were your results when backtesting?

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body:
I have done around a month of demo trading with live data, I will be making a new account to demonstrate its trading capabilities, plus I will be posting more vids about it!

Thank you for commenting!

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body:
What do you mean by that, are you referring to how I connect to darwinex? or something, if your curious on how it works, It will be able to connect to your darwinex acc via api, or your interactive brokers account via api, then after you have set all the settings in your accounts to allow algorithmic trading or whatnot, the trader will take the live data from darwinex or I.B and then start trading. That's pretty much the jist! I hope I helped, feel free to ask any questions.

Thanks for commenting

comments.author: Nokida
comments.body: If the AI bot was profitable, you wouldn't request subscription payments from users. Heck, you wouldn't even advertise it at all. But here we are.

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body:
Hahaha, I understand how it looks, the trades I have with this trader, and my proof of it being profitable have all been on  Darwinex demo acc and Interactive Brokers paper trading.

I genuinely believe it's something worth advertising, and something that genuinely could help a lot of people once I have finished the main setup for the public.

Thanks for commenting!

comments.author: YellowCroc999
comments.body: Delete this and touch some grass and maybe some common sense

replies.author: MobileZombie8236
replies.body: Wow, I can see I have upset you somehow, I am not sure where either of those insults fit into this situation, but I appreciate your comment! All publicity is good publicity! Feel free to ask any questions you might have!

comments.author: Emergency-Day-3857
comments.body: well done! I hope you will get enough fundraise by the end.

comments.author: Longjumping_South685
comments.body: Great grift, wish I thought it.
